category_sources: Official homepage at https://www.spinnaker.de/lbdb/ describes querying address data for Mutt and related mail/address modules.
source_facts.description says it is Little Brother's database for the mutt mail reader.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is The Little Brother's Database (lbdb).
docs_sources: Official homepage is a detailed documentation surface for configuration and modules.
Official homepage navigation links official man pages for lbdbq, lbdb-fetchaddr, and mutt_ldap_query.
repo_sources: Official homepage Download and Repository section links a Git repository on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official homepage documents modules for mail addresses, aliases, LDAP, vCard, and address-book sources.
source_facts.description identifies Mutt mail reader integration.
